Name: Cosmos DB Assessment Monitor Reader
Description: Azure Monitor + Log Analytics read access required by the CosmosToSqlAssessment tool's LogsQueryClient and Azure Monitor metric reads. Strict subset of the built-in 'Monitoring Reader' and 'Log Analytics Reader' roles - explicitly omits */read wildcard, alert rule reads, workbook reads, action group reads, and Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/sharedKeys/action so the role cannot read workspace shared keys. Assign at Log Analytics workspace scope (or its resource group).
